nodes.title: MMAUDIO
widgets_values:

nodes.title: Prompt 2
widgets_values: (At 0 seconds: The same blonde woman remains seated in photorealistic style as warm stage lights illuminate her glossy black bikini. She maintains intense eye contact while subtly adjusting grip on the straps under dramatic blue-toned backlighting.) (At 1 seconds: Camera pans slightly to right revealing more of dark wooden floorboards and out-of-focus equipment behind, emphasizing isolation within moody environment lit by orange spotlights casting soft glow across scene.) She gazes intensely at the camera while holding her chest as an erect penis emerges from between her breasts. Warm stage lights cast dramatic shadows on wooden floorboards in the background.) widgets_values:

## Text Encoders

- **FP16**: [🔗 umt5_xxl_fp16 text_encoder](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.1_ComfyUI_repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/umt5_xxl_fp16.safetensors)
- **NSFW FP8**: [🔗 nsfw_wan_umt5-xxl_fp8_scaled](https://huggingface.co/NSFW-API/NSFW-Wan-UMT5-XXL/resolve/main/nsfw_wan_umt5-xxl_fp8_scaled.safetensors)
- **NSFW BF16**: [🔗 nsfw_wan_umt5-xxl_bf16](https://huggingface.co/NSFW-API/NSFW-Wan-UMT5-XXL/resolve/main/nsfw_wan_umt5-xxl_bf16.safetensors)

⚙️ **GGUF VERSION**

- **Q8**: [🔗 umt5-xxl-encoder-Q8_0](https://huggingface.co/city96/umt5-xxl-encoder-gguf/resolve/main/umt5-xxl-encoder-Q8_0.gguf)

## VAE
- **BF16:**: [🔗 wan_2.1_vae](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/vae/wan_2.1_vae.safetensors)
- **FP32:**: [🔗 wan_2.1_fp32_vae](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/resolve/main/Wan2_1_VAE_fp32.safetensors)

## UPSCALE MODEL

- [🔗 2xLexicaRRDBNet](https://huggingface.co/huchukato/favs/resolve/main/ESRGAN/2xLexicaRRDBNet.pth)
- [🔗 2xLexicaRRDBNet_Sharp](https://huggingface.co/huchukato/favs/resolve/main/ESRGAN/2xLexicaRRDBNet_Sharp.pth)


---

# 🎬 Motion Settings

## Motion Amplitude
*Motion intensity multiplier* 
- **1.0** = normal
- **1.15** = recommended  
**Range:** 1.0 – 2.0

## Motion Frames
*Number of trailing frames from `previous_video` used as motion reference* 

**Default:** 5

---

# 🎨 Color Strenght

Controls color drift correction strength.

- **0.0** → no color issues  
- **0.01 – 0.05** → slight drift  
- **0.1 – 0.15** → strong shift  
- **0.2 – 0.3** → severe drift

nodes.title: QWEN3-VL GGUF
widgets_values:
## 🔖 To use the Qwen3-VL GGUF Quantized models you have to install *llama-cpp-python*


**🛑 STOP COMFYUI**

**📂 Activate the ComfyUI Virtual Enviroment**

In your ComfyUI root installation folder type:
on Windows:

Command Prompt:
```
\venv\Scripts\activate.bat
```
or Power Shell:
```
\venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1
```
on Linux:
```
. /venv/bin/activate
```
**⬇️ Install llama-cpp-python**
```
pip install --upgrade --force-reinstall --no-cache-dir "llama-cpp-python @ git+https://github.com/JamePeng/llama-cpp-python.git"
```
**🔄 Restart ComfyUI and enjoy**

- Fantasy
- Artistic portrait

nodes.title: AUTOPROMPT | MMAUDIO
widgets_values:
## 🔖 AUTOPROMPT

Install this modified node that allows you to use an uncensored QwenVL model


`git clone https://github.com/huchukato/ComfyUI-QwenVL-Mod.git ComfyUI/custom_nodes/ComfyUI-QwenVL-Mod`

----

## 🔈 MMAUDIO 

All of these files should be downloaded to `ComfyUI\models\mmaudio`

[🔗MMAudio Model](https://huggingface.co/phazei/NSFW_MMaudio/resolve/main/mmaudio_large_44k_nsfw_gold_8.5k_final_fp16.safetensors)

[🔗MMAudio VAE](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/MMAudio_safetensors/resolve/5984623e6b436818c6ff287ef6eec93e3e05aa3f/mmaudio_vae_44k_fp16.safetensors)

[🔗MMAudio Synchformer](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/MMAudio_safetensors/resolve/main/mmaudio_synchformer_fp16.safetensors)

[🔗MMAudio CLIP](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/MMAudio_safetensors/resolve/main/apple_DFN5B-CLIP-ViT-H-14-384_fp16.safetensors)
